title: microtoena nepalensis
intro: Microtoena nepalensis, also known as Himalayan mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Microtoena nepalensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
